name: Tiffany Haddish
blurb: After years on the club circuit she broke out with the 2017 film Girls Trip and a memoir, The Last Black Unicorn, then won a Grammy for her comedy special and album Black Mitzvah.
bio: Tiffany Haddish is an American stand-up comedian, actress, and author who was raised in South Central Los Angeles and in foster care. After years on the club circuit she broke out with the 2017 film Girls Trip and a memoir, The Last Black Unicorn, then won a Grammy for her comedy special and album Black Mitzvah. She is the second Black woman to win the Grammy for Best Comedy Album.

timeline.ev: Breakout role in the film Girls Trip
Hosts SNL, winning a Primetime Emmy
Publishes memoir The Last Black Unicorn
Wins Grammy for Best Comedy Album for Black Mitzvah

accolades: Grammy Award for Best Comedy Album (Black Mitzvah)
Primetime Emmy Award for hosting SNL (2017)
